description: LM Studio Plugin Toolkit Configuration - Scratch Pad Architecture

scratch_pad.description: Central scratch file for complex strings that fail JSON parameter escaping
scratch_pad.usage: Write complex patterns here via write_file, then process via run_command

fallback_chain.description: Ordered fallback sequence for tools that fail due to escaping issues

steps.description: Try the tool call directly with simple parameters
Write complex content to scratch_pad.path, then use run_command to process
Execute native command (ripgrep, python, node) via run_command

grep.notes: Complex regex patterns fail in grep tool parameters

search_directory.notes: Large result sets may need pagination

edit_file.fallback: write modified content to scratch, then run_command with powershell -c
edit_file.notes: Parameter names must match schema exactly (e.g., start_line not line)

cat_multiple.fallback: cat each file individually in sequence
cat_multiple.notes: cat_multiple has known issues with JSON parsing of non-JSON files

create_file.notes: JSON format creates empty {} - use write_file instead for complex JSON
